# @faucet/driver-nimiq-rpc

CurrencyDriver that talks to an external Nimiq Albatross JSON-RPC node.

Config:
- `network`: "main" | "test"
- `rpcUrl`: full URL of the JSON-RPC endpoint
- `auth` (optional): `{ username, password }` for basic auth
- `walletAddress`: faucet wallet address already unlocked on the node
- `walletPassphrase` (optional): passed through for node-side unlocking flows

Sweeper heuristic in `addressHistory`: â‰¥3 incoming, â‰¥1 outgoing, â‰¥90% of received funds already sent â†’ `isSweeper = true`. Use the `@faucet/abuse-onchain-nimiq` check to apply it.
